summary: Created implementation plan for adding a configurable image pull timeout (altcontainers.image.pull.timeout.ms, default 60000ms) to ContainerManager.pullImage(). Plan covers 7 files: AltcontainersProperties.java (new key + accessor), altcontainers.properties (classpath default), ContainerManager.java (timed awaitCompletion + timed get()), AltcontainersPropertiesTest.java (4 new tests), ContainerManagerPullTest.java (1 new test), and configuration.md docs (website + versioned).
